news.t: Xtrackers by DWS Repositions Equity ETF to Provide Access to Large U.S. Companies with Reduced Dependence on Big Tech
DWS Expands Xtrackers ESG Suite With Dividend, Growth and Value ETFs

holdings.infoBox: XOEX is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 5.63%, Intel at 3.74%, Cisco Systems at 3.21%, Caterpillar at 3.00%, and AbbVie at 2.68%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers S&P 100 Ex Top 20 ETF (XOEX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 100 Ex-Top 20 Select index. The fund tracks an index that excludes the top 20 stocks from the S&P 100 index. The ETF aims to avoid the mega-cap names of the index and focusing on the performance of the next 80 names XOEX was launched on Nov 9, 2022 and is issued by Xtrackers.
